_ml_agent_template.purpose: Reserved instructions for ML agents generating canonical Hito training-plan-v2 JSON.
_ml_agent_template.import_behavior: Accepted but ignored by Hito import. Do not treat this block as runtime truth.
runtime_truth_rules: Only plan truth belongs here: plan metadata, workout metadata, and segment prescriptions.
Do not invent app-state, UI state, sync state, database ids, session data, user auth state, or client-side flags.
Use one workout per calendar date.
Use ISO dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Use canonical training-plan-v2 field names whenever a canonical form exists.
segment_rules: Every workout must have a non-empty segments array.

Use segment_type values already supported by Hito: warmup, main, cooldown, recovery, rest, mobility, mobility_optional, strength, activation, drills, strides, recovery_jog, fueling, tempo_block, interval_block.
For simple time or distance segments, set duration_min or distance_km directly.
For interval_block or strides, use repeat_count plus either work_distance_km, work_duration_min, work_duration_sec, or duration_min for the work unit.
For repeated tempo_block segments, use repeat_count plus work_distance_km, work_duration_min, work_duration_sec, or duration_min.
Use recovery_duration_min, recovery_duration_sec, or recovery_distance_km for explicit recovery inside repeated segments.
You may alternatively use prescription.mode = repeats with repeat_unit and recovery_unit, but do not mix conflicting representations.
target_rules: Target is for user-facing training cues only.
Prefer canonical keys like hr_bpm_range and pace_min_per_km_range.
You may include intensity, rpe, cadence_spm_range, cue, and hint.
If extra structured target metadata is helpful, put it under target.extra as scalar key/value pairs only.
Do not place nested objects or arrays inside target.extra.
_ml_agent_template.non_canonical_field_rule: These fields may be present for compatibility, but Hito does not treat them as canonical persisted runtime truth. Do not rely on them for import success.
do_not_invent: Nested runtime objects outside the accepted compatibility placeholders
Fields not defined by the canonical contract unless they are clearly ignored compatibility placeholders

goal.goal_label: Finish a half marathon feeling controlled

runner_profile.secondary_goal: Rebuild running durability without rushing intensity

training_constraints.intensity_distribution: Mostly easy running with one quality touch
training_constraints.progression_policy: Increase gradually and protect recovery weeks
